review_title: A truly impressive site builder
description: Snapps has made building websites easier, faster, more streamlined, more scalable, and altogether more enjoyable.
author: Lois O.
pros: Snapps is so smooth and easy to use. Building sites takes a fraction of the time that it does on Weebly, and they instantly look so much more modern and professional with minimal effort. The features are a million times better - simple things like using custom fonts and spacing are just so easy.
cons: There could be more clear instructional videos (for complete novices to learn how to use Snapps). There should be an easier way to un-hide the navigation menu bar on pages. A few extra widgets (like a counter widget, for example) would be great, but this is not really a "con", I'm sure they are on the way soon!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Regrets about Snapps
description: I did run into a few issues, but they honestly were my own self created chaos. I skipped core elements in the training (even though the training was rather short and to the point) and tried to wing it with knowledge of older platforms I've used. So, I did make mistakes. The chat function has been my hero! Fast guidance and help with corrections, and they even followed up to be sure I was all set. Other companies I've waited 5-6 days on a simple REPLY and three weeks on fixes that wre not my fault, then the only way I discovered it was fixed, I had to reach out to them for follow up. Snapps it's a competely different ball game. The team seems to be on their toes and determined to make this the very best platform to choose.
author: Debbie H.
pros: My ONLY regret is not switching over to snapps 3 years ago. Super user-friendly, clearly well thought out and with all of the tools one could need for better rankings in the SEO tools and apps that are included in the account. Exceptional customer services, and follow up as well!
cons: That I took so long to try snapps. Long term, it cost my team time and my agency money. I should have been paying more attention to what my friends in this space were telling me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Stay away from snapps
description: They hold you hostage. Support is awful. I just spent 4 days, 1 hr the 1st 3 and 2 the last and they still haven't fixed my problem and they sent me 27 coded today so that resulted in locking me out of my accont AGAIN and then they hung up on me. Do not ever use them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: nothing. It was bad from the start and got worse. They sell godaddy domains for twice the price.
cons: Support. they lock you and and won't let you leave
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: A great platform for agencies and business owners alike
author: Dee S.
pros: Websites come out looking professional, sleek and are easily optimised for mobile.
cons: It's hard to say. I have been building with all the major drag and drop platforms for years now and they all have some very frustrating and time consuming flaws. Using Snapps has not been the same experience, I can build multiple websites seemlessly and with a reasonable amount of time invested.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: The best web design platform I could hope for!
description: Quicker lead gen, easier SEO structure. Love it.
author: Amy S.
pros: The connected data and ease of form setup, (AND THAT COPY FEATURE OMG!) H title changes with ease, and site wide text are all so so awesome! We use it daily and I'm continually impressed at how absolutely SWIFT I can move through to create sites as I do it more. I used to turn down branded site builds, but now I welcome them with greedy palms. The eventual ease is worth the squeeze. LOVE LOVE LOVE!
cons: Moving the sites from Weebly was a hassle at first, but we got a little help. Once we pruned them up, they were greater than before, for sure! I'd say the one thing I don't like most is that it's difficult to tell when the "hide" has been activated on mobile/tablet. A toggle or something would be nice for a quick glance. I just noticed the eyeball on the left column today, so that may be the workaround I needed. lol thanks for a great product.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Website Builders...I've tried them all
author: Joseph S.
pros: Snapps is extremely intuitive, I've used just about every drag and drop builder, and Snapps dashboard, templates, and the ability to customize layout and features are a wonderful balance between ease of use and functionality.
cons: Really, there isn't much I have found wanting. I wasn't thrilled with the idea of manually migrating sites from another platform, but Snapps even made that process simple by allowing me to pull in media from existing sites.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Snapps is Everything You Need and More
description: Snapps got me fired up about designing websites in a way that was motivating and inspiring. The people who designed it clearly care about what their customers want and need and have worked hard to make a product that is better and cheaper than its direct competitors. Aside from actually being cheaper... you save time using Snapps because it is so intuitive, and its features allow you to duplicate pages and templates quickly. I love Snapps. You will too. In fact, once you go Snapps you'll never go back. I have moved all my sites (from weebly, wix, and WordPress) to Snapps, and it was well worth the effort.
author: Tia B.
pros: I love everything about Snapps. Even the things I thought were hard, actually were easy once I figured them out. The support is out of this world, so any questions or difficulties you encounter will be addressed right away allowing you to move on quickly. The sites look phenomenal. Especially if you compare them to Weebly or Wix. The finished product looks better than any interface I've used... and I've used them all.
cons: I'm having a hard time coming up with a con here. Honestly, every thing I've ever thought I would like to do... I was able to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fast, Efficient, super user friendly, unbelievable support team.
author: Andrew N.
pros: I like that I can publish so many sites so quickly. No more messing around with optimizing photos because it already does it for you. super clean look and design will have your jaw on the floor asking to buy it a drink. Definitely the way of the future for website builds!
cons: The only thing I really disliked is I couldn't be on it sooner.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Snapps is Great for Getting Lead Gen Sites Up Quickly
description: Excellent. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and crew does excellent work.
author: Kyle R.
pros: I like how fast it is to get a great-looking site up quickly and indexed on Google.
cons: As Snapps.ai is a cutting edge website builder, there's lots of room for feature and UI developments, but, that being said, Snapps support is very responsive and has been taking a lot of suggestions down and is intent on developing them into their site building interface.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Snapps is a snap!
description: Overall, just loving it compared to the other platforms we have used. Hopefully, we'll get some time in the future to migrate our other sites to Snapps.
author: Brett G.
pros: Easy of use, the templates make it super easy to get a site live in little time.
cons: I have not found any issues with Snapps as yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best web builder that you’re not using...yet!
author: Jeff D.
pros: It’s easy to use and has a ton of awesome features!
cons: It indexes my sites too fast. Wink wink.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Fantastic Platform
description: Changing to Snapps has been a great decision. I love how easy and quick it is to produce high quality websites
author: Glenn B.
pros: Ease of use, great templates and quick build time.
cons: I have been using Snapps for around 3 months and so far there is nothing I don't like about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Novice to knowledible
description: Easy, quick, intuitive with professional, modern templates. Novice to knowledgable in 8wks with four published sites.
author: Susan C.
pros: The templates and drag and drop features
cons: Nothing as support always resolves my perceived issue
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Snapps is awesome
author: Matt S.
pros: Easy to use, plus it’s cost effective when trying to keep expenses under control.
cons: None really.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Where Have You Been All My Life?
description: Snapps has been able to solve many of the issues I have had in trying to provide the best experience for my large, non-profit organizations.
author: Amy N.
pros: The interface is superior to any other platform I've used. It's intuitive, logical, and user-friendly. Every feature is accessible in an efficient manner and significantly reduces excessive clicks and navigating. The "right-click" option is likely my favorite feature. Who wants to navigate through endless menu layers to access type options? And, can we talk about how incredible the three platform views are and how you can edit them individually? Say goodbye to sacrificing good design on the desktop or tablet for constraints on mobile! It goes without saying that the Snapps support is the best support out there for pretty much any software platform web developers use.
cons: Where were you two years ago or even a year ago? I have had to churn out websites on the most painful platforms known - and many of them are popular platforms. The amount of time that has been wasted on trying to get a site to look just right is time I'll never get back.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Snapps is the website builder I've been dreaming of
description: Snapps is simple use and only has a couple of "tricky bits" that, once learned, give you a way to build additional pages very efficiently. Support has been very responsive any time I've had an issue or question. There are a great variety of templates to start with. I love that you can easily import media from any site, create a mockup, and send a live preview to a client, without having to publish the site.
author: Marie J.
pros: Snapps combines the ease of use of a WYSIWYG website builder with the functionality and customizability of Wordpress. The mobile adaptability is superb! You can easily design separate elements for use on mobile, tablet, or desktop as needed.
cons: There is a slight learning curve on a few of the features, but they're not too difficult with the documentation/help pages and videos provided.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Snapps made it easy
author: Salaah K.
pros: I wanted a fast and straightforward way to build a website. I am telling you snapps made it easy. I’m not PC trendy but if you can use an app then you can use snapps. With snapps your website is just a click and drag away and there help center is 24hrs.[SENSITIVE CONTENT]
cons: its not free but its still worth it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Snapps is our go-to website builder
author: Ben H.
pros: Snapps is incredibly user friendly and intuitive. Our marketing agency has used multiple different website builders over the years (primarily Wordpress, but also Weebly, Wix, Shopify). In terms of ease of use, Snapps is similar to a Wix or Weebly, however completely outshines those builders in overall functionality. We got sick of constant updates for themes and plugins on Wordpress, not to mention security vulnerabilities and moved all our domains over to Snapps. The templates are beautiful, responsive, and professional looking.
cons: No real cons (as it relates to our agency). Not as many integrations as a platform like Wordpress, but Snapps is adding new integrations and features constantly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Learned and loved it in a SNAPP
description: I've used other website building platforms - and decided to try Snapps out when I heard about it. There are lots of template themes to choose from, lots of stock photos, it's easy to use widgets and get lots of advanced site features with a nice clean look. Geared for those with a small business. Lots of time saving features with the global and dynamic options. Will be using this for my site builds going forward and will definitely recommend it.
author: Marissa H.
pros: Easy to use with a short learning curve. Did not have to pay while I was trialing and deciding on the program.
cons: A few bugs that I've encountered that have been a real snag, but support wrote back right away wanting to dig into the issue. Just out of beta so I expected some ironing out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Perfect for a beginner new to building websites
author: Jeremy G.
pros: This is the second website building software I've used and the ease of use is amazing compared to the first one. I found myself struggling and getting frustrated with the first program, but with Snapps, I'm able to build and publish faster due to the way everything is set up. I still have a lot to learn, but this is truly the perfect program for anyone new to building websites. In addition, the pre-built templates are also amazing.
cons: I'm still new to building websites and I haven't found anything I like the least at this point. However, because I am new to building websites, it's very easy to get frustrated and overwhelmed because this is like learning a new language. That said, I am hoping for additional training to become better and better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Snapping sites together in a breeze
description: Support is friendly, responsive, and happy to help. The pricing is competitive, and the convenience factor seems like it's completely pro-bono. Really love this platform and am grateful it was recommended to me..
author: Blair G.
pros: I'm primarily a writer and build websites in my spare time. Challenge is: I'm not super techy and always felt resistance to learning builders on Wordpress. Coding isn't my skillset; writing is! What I like about Snapps is there's a ton of templates to use, and modifying them to my heart's content is extremely easy.
cons: Like any new platform, it can be confusing at first to learn how everything works. There is an invisible barrier of knowing how to ask questions for challenges you don't know how to describe. In my experience, it just takes time to become familiar with the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best web builder our there. Period
author: Shashank K.
pros: The speed with which you can publish a great looking website despite having no format education in web-building is simply mind-boggling. The builders of Snapps have basically figured out the thoughts of wordpress users who have often thought 'I wish xyz was easier to do' and weebly/wix/square users who have often though 'I wish I could make this more sophisticated and better looking with more features' and created what is truly the best of both worlds. I cannot recommend Snapps enough.
cons: While they have a sufficient number of them, enough for most people's needs, there could be more templates to build off of. I know Divi and Webflow and others have several hundreds of templates BUT All snapps templates are free, and like I said, they are quite sufficient for most purposes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mind Blowing
description: As someone who has always strived to build websites for business owners at scale, this has been my dream solution, so far. I built 10 in the time it would take to build 1, and those websites are already working their way up Google's rankings in less than a week. My overall experience is that I see massive opportunity to grow much faster as a business owner, while helping others do the same.
author: Silas M.
pros: The functionality of this program and how easy it is to build a website is unbeatable. Makes it worth building 5 sites even for a sole business.
cons: Of course I'd love to pay less, but I understand this program will cut the costs of other things I use in lead generation anyways, making in inexpensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: More bang for your buck !
description: Highly recommended, support is great also
author: James W.
pros: I had very limited knowledge of website building prior to using Snapps, for the last couple of months I have been using the platform every day and can honestly say it's so easy to use even for a complete beginner. The drag and drop format is great to use and the end result has good functionality whilst looking awesome.
cons: Nothing to say really my experience has been all good
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finally a website editor that doesn't suck
description: Snapps is awesome! It has all the best features of the more known CMS / website builder platforms all in one. It is easy to build sites kind of like Weebly, but it is more powerful/SEO friendly and customizable like Wordpress. Best price for the offered features I have seen yet! Definitely moving to Snapps exclusively for all our new sites.
author: Austin B.
pros: The ease of use and repeatability for making several sites at scale. The cost is very fair. They have professional templates that are easy to tailor to the needs of a client.
cons: This will get better as they grow, but there are some features/integrations that are currently not available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
